ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: طسٓمٓ ١
ayahs.translation: Ṭā, Seen, Meem.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ ٢
ayahs.translation: These are the verses of the clear Book.

ayahs.textUthmani: لَعَلَّكَ بَـٰخِعٌ نَّفْسَكَ أَلَّا يَكُونُوا۟ مُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَعَلَّكَ بَـٰخِعٌ نَّفْسَكَ أَلَّا يَكُونُواْ مُؤْمِنِينَ ٣
ayahs.textIndopak: لَعَلَّكَ بَاخِعٌ نَّـفۡسَكَ اَلَّا يَكُوۡنُوۡا مُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Perhaps, [O Muḥammad], you would kill yourself with grief that they will not be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: La'allaka baakhi'un nafsaka allaa yakoonoo mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmani: إِن نَّشَأْ نُنَزِّلْ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ءَايَةً فَظَلَّتْ أَعْنَـٰقُهُمْ لَهَا خَـٰضِعِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِن نَّشَأْ نُنَزِّلْ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ءَايَةً فَظَلَّتْ أَعْنَـٰقُهُمْ لَهَا خَـٰضِعِينَ ٤
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنۡ نَّشَاۡ نُنَزِّلۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ اٰيَةً فَظَلَّتۡ اَعۡنَاقُهُمۡ لَهَا خٰضِعِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: If We willed, We could send down to them from the sky a sign for which their necks would remain humbled.
ayahs.transliteration: In nashaa nunazzil 'alaihim minas samaaa'i Aayatan fazallat a'naaquhum lahaa khaadi'een

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مُحْدَثٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مُحْدَثٍ إِلَّا كَانُواْ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضِينَ ٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَا يَاۡتِيۡهِمۡ مِّنۡ ذِكۡرٍ مِّنَ الرَّحۡمٰنِ مُحۡدَثٍ اِلَّا كَانُوۡا عَنۡهُ مُعۡرِضِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And no mention [i.e., revelation] comes to them anew from the Most Merciful except that they turn away from it.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maa yaateehim min thikrim minar Rahmaani muhdasin illaa kaanoo 'anhu mu'rideen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوا۟ فَسَيَأْتِيهِمْ أَنۢبَـٰٓؤُا۟ مَا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُواْ فَسَيَأْتِيهِمْ أَنۢبَـٰٓؤُاْ مَا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ ٦
ayahs.textIndopak: فَقَدۡ كَذَّبُوۡا فَسَيَاۡتِيۡهِمۡ اَنۡۢـبٰٓــؤُا مَا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُوۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: For they have already denied, but there will come to them the news of that which they used to ridicule.
ayahs.transliteration: Faqad kaththaboo fasa-yaateehim ambaaa'u maa kaanoo bihee yastahzi'oon

ayahs.textUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَمْ أَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْاْ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَمْ أَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍ كَرِيمٍ ٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡا اِلَى الۡاَرۡضِ كَمۡ اَنۡۢبَتۡنَا فِيۡهَا مِنۡ كُلِّ زَوۡجٍ كَرِيۡمٍ‏
ayahs.translation: Did they not look at the earth - how much We have produced therein from every noble kind?
ayahs.transliteration: Awa-lam yaraw ilal ardi kam ambatnaa feehaa min kulli zawjin kareem

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ فِى ذَٲلِكَ لَأَيَةً‌ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ ٨
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ فِىۡ ذٰ لِكَ لَاٰيَةً​  ؕ وَّمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thaalika la-Aayah; Wa-maa kaana aksaruhum mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ ٩
ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَإِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبُّكَ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱئْتِ ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبُّكَ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱئْتِ ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ ١٠
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاِذۡ نَادٰى رَبُّكَ مُوۡسٰۤى اَنِ ائۡتِ الۡقَوۡمَ الظّٰلِمِيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And [mention] when your Lord called Moses, [saying], "Go to the wrongdoing people -
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-ith naadaa Rabbuka Moosaaa ani' til qawmaz zaalimeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ‌ۚ أَلَا يَتَّقُونَ ١١
ayahs.translation: The people of Pharaoh. Will they not fear Allāh?"

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يُكَذِّبُونِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يُكَذِّبُونِ ١٢
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ رَبِّ اِنِّىۡۤ اَخَافُ اَنۡ يُّكَذِّبُوۡنِؕ‏
ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed I fear that they will deny me
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala Rabbi inneee akhaafu ai yukaththiboon

ayahs.textUthmani: وَيَضِيقُ صَدْرِى وَلَا يَنطَلِقُ لِسَانِى فَأَرْسِلْ إِلَىٰ هَـٰرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيَضِيقُ صَدْرِى وَلَا يَنطَلِقُ لِسَانِى فَأَرْسِلْ إِلَىٰ هَـٰرُونَ ١٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَيَضِيۡقُ صَدۡرِىۡ وَلَا يَنۡطَلِقُ لِسَانِىۡ فَاَرۡسِلۡ اِلٰى هٰرُوۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And that my breast will tighten and my tongue will not be fluent, so send for Aaron.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-yadeequ sadree Wa-laa yantaliqu lisaanee fa-arsil ilaa Haaroon

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَهُمْ عَلَىَّ ذَنۢبٌ فَأَخَافُ أَن يَقْتُلُونِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَهُمْ عَلَىَّ ذَنۢبٌ فَأَخَافُ أَن يَقْتُلُونِ ١٤
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَهُمۡ عَلَىَّ ذَنۡۢبٌ فَاَخَافُ اَنۡ يَّقۡتُلُوۡنِ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And they have upon me a [claim due to] sin, so I fear that they will kill me."

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ كَلَّا ۖ فَٱذْهَبَا بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ ۖ إِنَّا مَعَكُم مُّسْتَمِعُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ كَلَّا‌ۖ فَٱذْهَبَا بِـَٔـايَـٰتِنَآ‌ۖ إِنَّا مَعَكُم مُّسْتَمِعُونَ ١٥
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ كَلَّا​ ۚ فَاذۡهَبَا بِاٰيٰتِنَآ​ اِنَّا مَعَكُمۡ مُّسۡتَمِعُوۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: [Allāh] said, "No. Go both of you with Our signs; indeed, We are with you, listening.
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala kallaa fathhabaa bi-Aayaatinaaa innaa ma'akum mustami'oon

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأْتِيَا فِرْعَوْنَ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأْتِيَا فِرْعَوْنَ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ١٦
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاۡتِيَا فِرۡعَوۡنَ فَقُوۡلَاۤ اِنَّا رَسُوۡلُ رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Go to Pharaoh and say, 'We are the messengers of the Lord of the worlds,
ayahs.transliteration: Faatiyaa Fir'awna faqoolaaa innaa Rasoolu Rabbil 'aalameen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَنْ أَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٲٓءِيلَ ١٧
ayahs.translation: [Commanded to say], "Send with us the Children of Israel."'"

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ أَلَمْ نُرَبِّكَ فِينَا وَلِيدًا وَلَبِثْتَ فِينَا مِنْ عُمُرِكَ سِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ أَلَمْ نُرَبِّكَ فِينَا وَلِيدًا وَلَبِثْتَ فِينَا مِنْ عُمُرِكَ سِنِينَ ١٨
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ اَلَمۡ نُرَبِّكَ فِيۡنَا وَلِيۡدًا وَّلَبِثۡتَ فِيۡنَا مِنۡ عُمُرِكَ سِنِيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "Did we not raise you among us as a child, and you remained among us for years of your life?
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala alam nurabbika feenaa waleedanw Wa-labista feenaa min 'umurika sineen

ayahs.textUthmani: وَفَعَلْتَ فَعْلَتَكَ ٱلَّتِى فَعَلْتَ وَأَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفَعَلْتَ فَعْلَتَكَ ٱلَّتِى فَعَلْتَ وَأَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ ١٩
ayahs.textIndopak: وَفَعَلۡتَ فَعۡلَتَكَ الَّتِىۡ فَعَلۡتَ وَاَنۡتَ مِنَ الۡكٰفِرِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And [then] you did your deed which you did, and you were of the ungrateful."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-fa'alta fa'latakal latee fa'alta Wa-anta minal kaafireen

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ فَعَلْتُهَآ إِذًا وَأَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ فَعَلْتُهَآ إِذًا وَأَنَا۟ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ ٢٠
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ فَعَلۡتُهَاۤ اِذًا وَّاَنَا مِنَ الضَّآلِّيۡنَؕ‏
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "I did it, then, while I was of those astray [i.e., ignorant].
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala fa'altuhaaa ithanw Wa-ana minad daaaleen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَفَرَرْتُ مِنكُمْ لَمَّا خِفْتُكُمْ فَوَهَبَ لِى رَبِّى حُكْمًا وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَفَرَرْتُ مِنكُمْ لَمَّا خِفْتُكُمْ فَوَهَبَ لِى رَبِّى حُكْمًا وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ ٢١
ayahs.textIndopak: فَفَرَرۡتُ مِنۡكُمۡ لَمَّا خِفۡتُكُمۡ فَوَهَبَ لِىۡ رَبِّىۡ حُكۡمًا وَّجَعَلَنِىۡ مِنَ الۡمُرۡسَلِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: So I fled from you when I feared you. Then my Lord granted me judgement [i.e., wisdom and prophet hood] and appointed me [as one] of the messengers.
ayahs.transliteration: Fafarartu minkum lam-maa khiftukum fawahaba lee Rabbee hukmanw Wa-ja'alanee minal mursaleen

ayahs.textUthmani: وَتِلْكَ نِعْمَةٌ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَىَّ أَنْ عَبَّدتَّ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتِلْكَ نِعْمَةٌ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَىَّ أَنْ عَبَّدتَّ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٲٓءِيلَ ٢٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَتِلۡكَ نِعۡمَةٌ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَىَّ اَنۡ عَبَّدْتَّ بَنِىۡۤ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَ ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And is this a favor of which you remind me - that you have enslaved the Children of Israel?"
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-tilka ni'matun tamun-nuhaa 'alaiya an 'abbatta Baneee Israaa'eel

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَا رَبُّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ٢٣
ayahs.translation: Said Pharaoh, "And what is the Lord of the worlds?"

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٲتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ‌ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ ٢٤
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ رَبُّ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاؕ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ مُّوۡقِنِيۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "The Lord of the heavens and earth and that between them, if you should be convinced."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala Rabbus samaawaati wal-ardi Wa-maa bainahumaa in kuntum mooqineen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ لِمَنْ حَوْلَهُۥٓ أَلَا تَسْتَمِعُونَ ٢٥
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said to those around him, "Do you not hear?"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ٢٦
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "Your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers."

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَكُمُ ٱلَّذِىٓ أُرْسِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَكُمُ ٱلَّذِىٓ أُرْسِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمَجْنُونٌ ٢٧
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ اِنَّ رَسُوۡلَـكُمُ الَّذِىۡۤ اُرۡسِلَ اِلَيۡكُمۡ لَمَجۡنُوۡنٌ‏
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "Indeed, your 'messenger' who has been sent to you is mad."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala inna Rasoolakumul lathee ursila ilaikum lamajnoon

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ‌ۖ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ ٢٨
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ رَبُّ الۡمَشۡرِقِ وَالۡمَغۡرِبِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا ؕ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡقِلُوۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "Lord of the east and the west and that between them, if you were to reason."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala Rabbul mashriqi wal-maghribi Wa-maa baina-humaa in kuntum ta'qiloon

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ لَئِنِ ٱتَّخَذْتَ إِلَـٰهًا غَيْرِى لَأَجْعَلَنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمَسْجُونِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ لَئِنِ ٱتَّخَذْتَ إِلَـٰهًا غَيْرِى لَأَجْعَلَنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمَسْجُونِينَ ٢٩
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ لَٮِٕنِ اتَّخَذۡتَ اِلٰهًا غَيۡرِىۡ لَاَجۡعَلَـنَّكَ مِنَ الۡمَسۡجُوۡنِيۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "If you take a god other than me, I will surely place you among those imprisoned."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala la'init takhathta ilaahan ghairee la-aj'alannaka minal masjooneen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ أَوَلَوْ جِئْتُكَ بِشَىْءٍ مُّبِينٍ ٣٠
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "Even if I brought you something [i.e., proof] manifest?"

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ فَأْتِ بِهِۦٓ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ فَأْتِ بِهِۦٓ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ ٣١
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ فَاۡتِ بِهٖۤ اِنۡ كُنۡتَ مِنَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "Then bring it, if you should be of the truthful."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala faati biheee in kunta minas saadiqeen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَلْقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ ثُعْبَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَلْقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ ثُعْبَانٌ مُّبِينٌ ٣٢
ayahs.textIndopak: ​فَاَ لۡقٰى عَصَاهُ فَاِذَا هِىَ ثُعۡبَانٌ مُّبِيۡنٌ​ ۖ ​​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: So [Moses] threw his staff, and suddenly it was a serpent manifest.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُۥ فَإِذَا هِىَ بَيْضَآءُ لِلنَّـٰظِرِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُۥ فَإِذَا هِىَ بَيْضَآءُ لِلنَّـٰظِرِينَ ٣٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّنَزَعَ يَدَهٗ فَاِذَا هِىَ بَيۡضَآءُ لِلنّٰظِرِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And he drew out his hand; thereupon it was white for the observers.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-naza'a yadahoo faithaa hiya baidaaa'u linnaa-zireen

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ لِلْمَلَإِ حَوْلَهُۥٓ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَسَـٰحِرٌ عَلِيمٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ لِلْمَلَإِ حَوْلَهُۥٓ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَسَـٰحِرٌ عَلِيمٌ ٣٤
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ لِلۡمَلَاِ حَوۡلَهٗۤ اِنَّ هٰذَا لَسٰحِرٌ عَلِيۡمٌۙ‏
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said to the eminent ones around him, "Indeed, this is a learned magician.
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala lilmala-i hawlahooo inna haathaa lasaahirun 'aleem

ayahs.textUthmani: يُرِيدُ أَن يُخْرِجَكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِۦ فَمَاذَا تَأْمُرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يُرِيدُ أَن يُخْرِجَكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِۦ فَمَاذَا تَأْمُرُونَ ٣٥
ayahs.textIndopak: يُّرِيۡدُ اَنۡ يُّخۡرِجَكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَرۡضِكُمۡ بِسِحۡرِهٖ ​ۖ  فَمَاذَا تَاۡمُرُوۡنَ​‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: He wants to drive you out of your land by his magic, so what do you advise?"
ayahs.transliteration: Yureedu aien yukhrijakum min ardikum bisihrihee famaathaa taamuroon

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ أَرْجِهْ وَأَخَاهُ وَٱبْعَثْ فِى ٱلْمَدَآئِنِ حَـٰشِرِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُوٓاْ أَرْجِهْ وَأَخَاهُ وَٱبْعَثْ فِى ٱلْمَدَآئِنِ حَـٰشِرِينَ ٣٦
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالُوۡۤا اَرۡجِهۡ وَاَخَاهُ وَابۡعَثۡ فِى الۡمَدَآٮِٕنِ حٰشِرِيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: They said, "Postpone [the matter of] him and his brother and send among the cities gatherers
ayahs.transliteration: Qaalooo arjih Wa-akhaahu wab'as fil madaaa'ini haashireen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَأْتُوكَ بِكُلِّ سَحَّارٍ عَلِيمٍ ٣٧
ayahs.translation: Who will bring you every learned, skilled magician."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَجُمِعَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ لِمِيقَـٰتِ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ ٣٨
ayahs.translation: So the magicians were assembled for the appointment of a well-known day.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَقِيلَ لِلنَّاسِ هَلْ أَنتُم مُّجْتَمِعُونَ ٣٩
ayahs.translation: And it was said to the people, "Will you congregate.

ayahs.textUthmani: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ ٱلسَّحَرَةَ إِن كَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ ٱلسَّحَرَةَ إِن كَانُواْ هُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ ٤٠
ayahs.textIndopak: لَعَلَّنَا نَـتَّبِعُ السَّحَرَةَ اِنۡ كَانُوۡا هُمُ الۡغٰلِبِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: That we might follow the magicians if they are the predominant?"
ayahs.transliteration: La'allanaa nattabi'us saharata in kaanoo humul ghaalibeen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ قَالُوا۟ لِفِرْعَوْنَ أَئِنَّ لَنَا لَأَجْرًا إِن كُنَّا نَحْنُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ قَالُواْ لِفِرْعَوْنَ أَئِنَّ لَنَا لَأَجْرًا إِن كُنَّا نَحْنُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ ٤١
ayahs.textIndopak: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ السَّحَرَةُ قَالُوۡا لِفِرۡعَوۡنَ اَٮِٕنَّ لَـنَا لَاَجۡرًا اِنۡ كُنَّا نَحۡنُ الۡغٰلِبِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And when the magicians arrived, they said to Pharaoh, "Is there indeed for us a reward if we are the predominant?"
ayahs.transliteration: Falammaa jaaa'as saharatu qaaloo li-Fir'awna a'inna lanaa la-ajjran in kunnaa nahnul ghaalibeen

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ نَعَمْ وَإِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ نَعَمْ وَإِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ ٤٢
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ نَعَمۡ وَاِنَّكُمۡ اِذًا لَّمِنَ الۡمُقَرَّبِيۡنَ‏

words.translation: the ones who are brought near

ayahs.translation: He said, "Yes, and indeed, you will then be of those near [to me]."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala na'am Wa-innakum ithal laminal muqarrabeen

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰٓ أَلْقُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُم مُّلْقُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰٓ أَلْقُواْ مَآ أَنتُم مُّلْقُونَ ٤٣
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ لَهُمۡ مُّوۡسٰۤى اَلۡقُوۡا مَاۤ اَنۡتُمۡ مُّلۡقُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Moses said to them, "Throw whatever you will throw."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala lahum Moosaaa alqoo maaa antum mulqoon

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَلْقَوْا۟ حِبَالَهُمْ وَعِصِيَّهُمْ وَقَالُوا۟ بِعِزَّةِ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَلْقَوْاْ حِبَالَهُمْ وَعِصِيَّهُمْ وَقَالُواْ بِعِزَّةِ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبُونَ ٤٤
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَلۡقَوۡا حِبَالَهُمۡ وَعِصِيَّهُمۡ وَقَالُوۡا بِعِزَّةِ فِرۡعَوۡنَ اِنَّا لَـنَحۡنُ الۡغٰلِبُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: So they threw their ropes and their staffs and said, "By the might of Pharaoh, indeed it is we who are predominant."
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-alqaw hibaalahum Wa-'isiyyahum Wa-qaaloo bi'izzati Fir'awna innaa lanahnul ghaaliboon

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَلْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَلْقَفُ مَا يَأْفِكُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَلْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَلْقَفُ مَا يَأْفِكُونَ ٤٥
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَ لۡقٰى مُوۡسٰى عَصَاهُ فَاِذَا هِىَ تَلۡقَفُ مَا يَاۡفِكُوۡنَ​ ۖ ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Then Moses threw his staff, and at once it devoured what they falsified.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-alqaa Moosaa 'asaahu fa-ithaa hiya talqafu maa yaafikoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأُلْقِىَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سَـٰجِدِينَ ٤٦
ayahs.translation: So the magicians fell down in prostration [to Allāh].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُوٓاْ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ٤٧
ayahs.translation: They said, "We have believed in the Lord of the worlds,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: رَبِّ مُوسَىٰ وَهَـٰرُونَ ٤٨
ayahs.translation: The Lord of Moses and Aaron."

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمْ لَهُۥ قَبْلَ أَنْ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحْرَ فَلَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ ۚ لَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلَـٰفٍ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمْ لَهُۥ قَبْلَ أَنْ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمْ‌ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحْرَ فَلَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ‌ۚ لَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلَـٰفٍ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ ٤٩
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ اٰمَنۡتُمۡ لَهٗ قَبۡلَ اَنۡ اٰذَنَ لَـكُمۡ​ۚ اِنَّهٗ لَـكَبِيۡرُكُمُ الَّذِىۡ عَلَّمَكُمُ السِّحۡرَ​ۚ فَلَسَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ ۙ لَاُقَطِّعَنَّ اَيۡدِيَكُمۡ وَاَرۡجُلَـكُمۡ مِّنۡ خِلَافٍ وَّلَاُصَلِّبَنَّكُمۡ اَجۡمَعِيۡنَ​ۚ‏

words.translation: and I will surely crucify you

ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "You believed him [i.e., Moses] before I gave you permission. Indeed, he is your leader who has taught you magic, but you are going to know. I will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I will surely crucify you all."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala aamantum lahoo qabla an aathana lakum innahoo lakabeerukumul lathee 'alla-makumus sihra falasawfa ta'lamoon; la-uqatti'anna aidiyakum Wa-arjulakum min khilaafinw Wa-la-usallibanna-kum ajma'een

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالُوا۟ لَا ضَيْرَ ۖ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنقَلِبُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ لَا ضَيْرَ‌ۖ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنقَلِبُونَ ٥٠
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالُوۡا لَا ضَيۡرَ​ اِنَّاۤ اِلٰى رَبِّنَا مُنۡقَلِبُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: They said, "No harm. Indeed, to our Lord we will return.
ayahs.transliteration: Qaaloo la daira innaaa ilaa Rabbinaa munqalliboon

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَـٰيَـٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَـٰيَـٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٥١
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّا نَطۡمَعُ اَنۡ يَّغۡفِرَ لَـنَا رَبُّنَا خَطٰيٰـنَاۤ اَنۡ كُنَّاۤ اَوَّلَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, we aspire that our Lord will forgive us our sins because we were the first of the believers."
ayahs.transliteration: Innaa natma'u aien yaghfira lanaa Rabbunna khataa-yaanaaa an kunnaaa awwalal mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmani: ۞ وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِىٓ إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ۞ وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِىٓ إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ ٥٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاَوۡحَيۡنَاۤ اِلٰى مُوۡسٰٓى اَنۡ اَسۡرِ بِعِبَادِىۡۤ اِنَّكُمۡ مُّتَّبَعُوۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And We inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants; indeed, you will be pursued."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-awhainaaa ilaa Moosaaa an asri bi'ibaadeee innakum muttaba'oon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَرْسَلَ فِرْعَوْنُ فِى ٱلْمَدَآئِنِ حَـٰشِرِينَ ٥٣
ayahs.translation: Then Pharaoh sent among the cities gatherers

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَشِرْذِمَةٌ قَلِيلُونَ ٥٤
ayahs.translation: [And said], "Indeed, those are but a small band,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّهُمْ لَنَا لَغَآئِظُونَ ٥٥
ayahs.translation: And indeed, they are enraging us,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّا لَجَمِيعٌ حَـٰذِرُونَ ٥٦
ayahs.translation: And indeed, we are a cautious society..."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَخْرَجْنَـٰهُم مِّن جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ ٥٧
ayahs.translation: So We removed them from gardens and springs

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكُنُوزٍ وَمَقَامٍ كَرِيمٍ ٥٨
ayahs.translation: And treasures and honorable station -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَٲلِكَ وَأَوْرَثْنَـٰهَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٲٓءِيلَ ٥٩

words.translation: And We caused to inherit them

ayahs.translation: Thus. And We caused to inherit it the Children of Israel.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَتْبَعُوهُم مُّشْرِقِينَ ٦٠
ayahs.translation: So they pursued them at sunrise.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَلَمَّا تَرَٰٓءَا ٱلْجَمْعَانِ قَالَ أَصْحَـٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّا لَمُدْرَكُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَمَّا تَرَٲٓءَا ٱلْجَمْعَانِ قَالَ أَصْحَـٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّا لَمُدْرَكُونَ ٦١
ayahs.textIndopak: فَلَمَّا تَرَآءَ الۡجَمۡعٰنِ قَالَ اَصۡحٰبُ مُوۡسٰٓى اِنَّا لَمُدۡرَكُوۡنَ​ۚ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And when the two companies saw one another, the companions of Moses said, "Indeed, we are to be overtaken!"
ayahs.transliteration: Falammaa taraaa'al jam'aani qaala as-haabu Moosaaa innaa lamudrakoon

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّ مَعِىَ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ كَلَّآ‌ۖ إِنَّ مَعِىَ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ ٦٢
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ كَلَّا​​ ۚ اِنَّ مَعِىَ رَبِّىۡ سَيَهۡدِيۡنِ‏
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "No! Indeed, with me is my Lord; He will guide me."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala kallaaa inna ma'iya Rabbee sa-yahdeen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱضْرِب بِّعَصَاكَ ٱلْبَحْرَ ۖ فَٱنفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرْقٍ كَٱلطَّوْدِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱضْرِب بِّعَصَاكَ ٱلْبَحْرَ‌ۖ فَٱنفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرْقٍ كَٱلطَّوْدِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ٦٣
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَوۡحَيۡنَاۤ اِلٰى مُوۡسٰٓى اَنِ اضۡرِبْ بِّعَصَاكَ الۡبَحۡرَ​ؕ فَانْفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرۡقٍ كَالطَّوۡدِ الۡعَظِيۡمِ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Then We inspired to Moses, "Strike with your staff the sea," and it parted, and each portion was like a great towering mountain.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-awhainaaa ilaa Moosaaa anid rib bi'asaakal bahra fanfalaqa fakaana kullu firqin kattawdil 'azeem

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَزْلَفْنَا ثَمَّ ٱلْأَخَرِينَ ٦٤
ayahs.translation: And We advanced thereto the others [i.e., the pursuers].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَنجَيْنَا مُوسَىٰ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَ ٦٥
ayahs.translation: And We saved Moses and those with him, all together.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ أَغْرَقْنَا ٱلْأَخَرِينَ ٦٦
ayahs.translation: Then We drowned the others.

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ فِى ذَٲلِكَ لَأَيَةً‌ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ ٦٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ فِىۡ ذٰ لِكَ لَاَيَةً ​ ؕ وَمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thaalika la-Aayaah; Wa-maa kaana aksaru-hu mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ ٦٨
ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱتْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ نَبَأَ إِبْرَٲهِيمَ ٦٩
ayahs.translation: And recite to them the news of Abraham,

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ ٧٠
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذۡ قَالَ لِاَبِيۡهِ وَقَوۡمِهٖ مَا تَعۡبُدُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: When he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship?"
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qaala li-abeehi Wa-qawmihee maa ta'budoon

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالُوا۟ نَعْبُدُ أَصْنَامًا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عَـٰكِفِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ نَعْبُدُ أَصْنَامًا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عَـٰكِفِينَ ٧١
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالُوۡا نَـعۡبُدُ اَصۡنَامًا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عٰكِفِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: They said, "We worship idols and remain to them devoted."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ هَلْ يَسْمَعُونَكُمْ إِذْ تَدْعُونَ ٧٢
ayahs.translation: He said, "Do they hear you when you supplicate?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَوْ يَنفَعُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَضُرُّونَ ٧٣
ayahs.translation: Or do they benefit you, or do they harm?"

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ بَلْ وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا كَذَٲلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ ٧٤
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالُوۡا بَلۡ وَجَدۡنَاۤ اٰبَآءَنَا كَذٰلِكَ يَفۡعَلُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: They said, "But we found our fathers doing thus."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaaloo bal wajadnaaa aabaaa-'anaa kathaalika yaf'aloon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ ٧٥
ayahs.translation: He said, "Then do you see what you have been worshipping,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُمُ ٱلْأَقْدَمُونَ ٧٦
ayahs.translation: You and your ancient forefathers?

ayahs.textUthmani: فَإِنَّهُمْ عَدُوٌّ لِّىٓ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِنَّهُمْ عَدُوٌّ لِّىٓ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ٧٧
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاِنَّهُمۡ عَدُوٌّ لِّىۡۤ اِلَّا رَبَّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, they are enemies to me, except the Lord of the worlds,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَنِى فَهُوَ يَهْدِينِ ٧٨
ayahs.translation: Who created me, and He [it is who] guides me.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلَّذِى هُوَ يُطْعِمُنِى وَيَسْقِينِ ٧٩
ayahs.translation: And it is He who feeds me and gives me drink.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا مَرِضْتُ فَهُوَ يَشْفِينِ ٨٠
ayahs.translation: And when I am ill, it is He who cures me

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلَّذِى يُمِيتُنِى ثُمَّ يُحْيِينِ ٨١
ayahs.translation: And who will cause me to die and then bring me to life

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لِى خَطِيٓـَٔتِى يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لِى خَطِيٓــَٔتِى يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ ٨٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَالَّذِىۡۤ اَطۡمَعُ اَنۡ يَّغۡفِرَ لِىۡ خَطِٓیْــَٔـتِىۡ يَوۡمَ الدِّيۡنِ ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And who I aspire that He will forgive me my sin on the Day of Recompense."
ayahs.transliteration: Wallatheee atma'u aien yaghfira lee khateee'-atee Yawmad Deen

ayahs.textUthmani: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِى بِٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِى بِٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ ٨٣
ayahs.textIndopak: رَبِّ هَبۡ لِىۡ حُكۡمًا وَّاَلۡحِقۡنِىۡ بِالصّٰلِحِيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: [And he said], "My Lord, grant me authority and join me with the righteous.
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbi hab lee hukmanw Wa-alhiqnee bis-saaliheen

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱجْعَل لِّى لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱجْعَل لِّى لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِى ٱلْأَخِرِينَ ٨٤
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاجۡعَلْ لِّىۡ لِسَانَ صِدۡقٍ فِى الۡاٰخِرِيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And grant me a mention [i.e., reputation] of honor among later generations.
ayahs.transliteration: Waj'al lee lisaana sidqin fil aakhireen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱجْعَلْنِى مِن وَرَثَةِ جَنَّةِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ ٨٥
ayahs.translation: And place me among the inheritors of the Garden of Pleasure.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱغْفِرْ لِأَبِىٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱغْفِرْ لِأَبِىٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ ٨٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاغۡفِرۡ لِاَبِىۡۤ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ مِنَ الضَّآلِّيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And forgive my father. Indeed, he has been of those astray.
ayahs.transliteration: Waghfir li-abeee innahoo kaana mind daalleen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا تُخْزِنِى يَوْمَ يُبْعَثُونَ ٨٧
ayahs.translation: And do not disgrace me on the Day they are [all] resurrected -

ayahs.textUthmani: يَوْمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٌ وَلَا بَنُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٌ وَلَا بَنُونَ ٨٨
ayahs.textIndopak: يَوۡمَ لَا يَنۡفَعُ مَالٌ وَّلَا بَنُوۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: The Day when there will not benefit [anyone] wealth or children
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma laa yanfa'u maalunw Wa-laa banoon

ayahs.textUthmani: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ ٨٩
ayahs.textIndopak: اِلَّا مَنۡ اَتَى اللّٰهَ بِقَلۡبٍ سَلِيۡمٍؕ‏
ayahs.translation: But only one who comes to Allāh with a sound heart."
ayahs.transliteration: Illaa man atal laaha biqalbin saleem

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ ٩٠
ayahs.translation: And Paradise will be brought near [that Day] to the righteous.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلْجَحِيمُ لِلْغَاوِينَ ٩١
ayahs.translation: And Hellfire will be brought forth for the deviators,

ayahs.textUthmani: وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ ٩٢
ayahs.translation: And it will be said to them, "Where are those you used to worship
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-qeela lahum aina maa kuntum ta'budoon

ayahs.textUthmani: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلْ يَنصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنتَصِرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلْ يَنصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنتَصِرُونَ ٩٣
ayahs.textIndopak: مِنۡ دُوۡنِ اللّٰهِؕ هَلۡ يَنۡصُرُوۡنَكُمۡ اَوۡ يَنۡتَصِرُوۡنَؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Other than Allāh? Can they help you or help themselves?"
ayahs.transliteration: Min doonil laahi hal yansuroonakum aw yantasiroon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَكُبْكِبُواْ فِيهَا هُمْ وَٱلْغَاوُۥنَ ٩٤
ayahs.translation: So they will be overturned into it [i.e., Hellfire], they and the deviators

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجُنُودُ إِبْلِيسَ أَجْمَعُونَ ٩٥
ayahs.translation: And the soldiers of Iblees, all together.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ وَهُمْ فِيهَا يَخْتَصِمُونَ ٩٦
ayahs.translation: They will say while they dispute therein,

ayahs.textUthmani: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ ٩٧
ayahs.textIndopak: تَاللّٰهِ اِنۡ كُنَّا لَفِىۡ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِيۡنٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: "By Allāh, we were indeed in manifest error
ayahs.transliteration: Tallaahi in kunnaa lafee dalaalim mubeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ نُسَوِّيكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ٩٨
ayahs.translation: When we equated you with the Lord of the worlds.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَضَلَّنَآ إِلَّا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ ٩٩
ayahs.translation: And no one misguided us except the criminals.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَمَا لَنَا مِن شَـٰفِعِينَ ١٠٠
ayahs.translation: So now we have no intercessors

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا صَدِيقٍ حَمِيمٍ ١٠١
ayahs.translation: And not a devoted friend.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ١٠٢
ayahs.textIndopak: فَلَوۡ اَنَّ لَـنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Then if we only had a return [to the world] and could be of the believers..."
ayahs.transliteration: Falaw anna lanaa karratan fanakoona minal mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ فِى ذَٲلِكَ لَأَيَةً‌ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ ١٠٣
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ فِىۡ ذٰ لِكَ لَاٰيَةً​  ؕ وَّمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thaalika la-Aayatanw Wa-maa kaana aksaruhum mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ ١٠٤
ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ ١٠٥
ayahs.translation: The people of Noah denied the messengers

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ ١٠٦
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ اَخُوۡهُمۡ نُوۡحٌ اَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: When their brother Noah said to them, "Will you not fear Allāh?
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qaala lahum akhoohum Noohun alaa tattaqoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ ١٠٧
ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ ١٠٨
ayahs.translation: So fear Allāh and obey me.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَسْــَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ‌ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ١٠٩
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَاۤ اَسۡـــَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ اَجۡرٍ​ۚ اِنۡ اَجۡرِىَ اِلَّا عَلٰى رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maaa as'alukum 'alaihi min ajrin in ajriya illaa 'alaa Rabbil 'aalameen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ ١١٠
ayahs.translation: So fear Allāh and obey me."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ۞ قَالُوٓاْ أَنُؤْمِنُ لَكَ وَٱتَّبَعَكَ ٱلْأَرْذَلُونَ ١١١
ayahs.translation: They said, "Should we believe you while you are followed by the lowest [class of people]?"

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ وَمَا عِلْمِى بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ وَمَا عِلْمِى بِمَا كَانُواْ يَعْمَلُونَ ١١٢
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ وَمَا عِلۡمِىۡ بِمَا كَانُوۡا يَعۡمَلُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: He said, "And what is my knowledge of what they used to do?

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنْ حِسَابُهُمْ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّى ۖ لَوْ تَشْعُرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنْ حِسَابُهُمْ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّى‌ۖ لَوْ تَشْعُرُونَ ١١٣
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنۡ حِسَابُهُمۡ اِلَّا عَلٰى رَبِّىۡ​ لَوۡ تَشۡعُرُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Their account is only upon my Lord, if you [could] perceive.
ayahs.transliteration: In hisaabuhum illaa 'alaa Rabbee law tash'uroon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَنَا۟ بِطَارِدِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ١١٤
ayahs.translation: And I am not one to drive away the believers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنْ أَنَا۟ إِلَّا نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ ١١٥
ayahs.translation: I am only a clear warner."

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَرْجُومِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَرْجُومِينَ ١١٦
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالُوۡا لَٮِٕنۡ لَّمۡ تَنۡتَهِ يٰـنُوۡحُ لَـتَكُوۡنَنَّ مِنَ الۡمَرۡجُوۡمِيۡنَؕ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: They said, "If you do not desist, O Noah, you will surely be of those who are stoned."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaaloo la'il lam tantahi yaa-Noohu latakoonanna minal marjoomeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنَّ قَوْمِى كَذَّبُونِ ١١٧
ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed my people have denied me.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَٱفْتَحْ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَهُمْ فَتْحًا وَنَجِّنِى وَمَن مَّعِىَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱفْتَحْ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَهُمْ فَتْحًا وَنَجِّنِى وَمَن مَّعِىَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ١١٨
ayahs.textIndopak: فَافۡتَحۡ بَيۡنِىۡ وَبَيۡنَهُمۡ فَتۡحًا وَّنَجِّنِىۡ وَمَنۡ مَّعِىَ مِنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Then judge between me and them with decisive judgement and save me and those with me of the believers."
ayahs.transliteration: Faftab bainee Wa-bai-nahum fat-hanw Wa-najjinee Wa-mam ma'iya minal mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَنجَيْنَـٰهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَنجَيْنَـٰهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ ١١٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَنۡجَيۡنٰهُ وَمَنۡ مَّعَهٗ فِى الۡـفُلۡكِ الۡمَشۡحُوۡنِ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: So We saved him and those with him in the laden ship.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-anjainaahu Wa-mam ma'ahoo fil fulkil mashhoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ أَغْرَقْنَا بَعْدُ ٱلْبَاقِينَ ١٢٠
ayahs.translation: Then We drowned thereafter the remaining ones.

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ فِى ذَٲلِكَ لَأَيَةً‌ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ ١٢١
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ فِىۡ ذٰ لِكَ لَاَيَةً​  ؕ وَّمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thaalika la-Aayaah; Wa-maa kaana aksaruhum mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ ١٢٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الۡعَزِيۡزُ الرَّحِيۡمُ‏
ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ ١٢٣
ayahs.translation: ʿAad denied the messengers

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ ١٢٤
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ اَخُوۡهُمۡ هُوۡدٌ اَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: When their brother Hūd said to them, "Will you not fear Allāh?
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qaala lahum akhoohum Hoodun alaa tattaqoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ ١٢٥
ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ ١٢٦
ayahs.translation: So fear Allāh and obey me.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَسْــَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ‌ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ١٢٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَاۤ اَسۡــَٔـلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ اَجۡرٍ​ۚ اِنۡ اَجۡرِىَ اِلَّا عَلٰى رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maa as'alukum 'alaihi min ajrin in ajriya illaa 'alaa Rabbil 'aalameen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَتَبْنُونَ بِكُلِّ رِيعٍ ءَايَةً تَعْبَثُونَ ١٢٨
ayahs.translation: Do you construct on every elevation a sign, amusing yourselves,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَتَّخِذُونَ مَصَانِعَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَخْلُدُونَ ١٢٩
ayahs.translation: And take for yourselves constructions [i.e., palaces and fortresses] that you might abide eternally?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا بَطَشْتُم بَطَشْتُمْ جَبَّارِينَ ١٣٠
ayahs.translation: And when you strike, you strike as tyrants.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ ١٣١
ayahs.translation: So fear Allāh and obey me.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَمَدَّكُم بِمَا تَعْلَمُونَ ١٣٢
ayahs.translation: And fear He who provided you with that which you know,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَمَدَّكُم بِأَنْعَـٰمٍ وَبَنِينَ ١٣٣
ayahs.translation: Provided you with grazing livestock and children

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ ١٣٤
ayahs.translation: And gardens and springs.

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ ١٣٥
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنِّىۡۤ اَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيۡمٍؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a terrible day."

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْنَآ أَوَعَظْتَ أَمْ لَمْ تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْوَٰعِظِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْنَآ أَوَعَظْتَ أَمْ لَمْ تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْوَٲعِظِينَ ١٣٦
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالُوۡا سَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡنَاۤ اَوَعَظۡتَ اَمۡ لَمۡ تَكُنۡ مِّنَ الۡوٰعِظِيۡنَۙ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: They said, "It is all the same to us whether you advise or are not of the advisors.
ayahs.transliteration: Qaaloo sawaaa'un 'alainaaa awa-'azta am lam takum minal waa'izeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا خُلُقُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ١٣٧
ayahs.translation: This is not but the custom of the former peoples,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ ١٣٨
ayahs.translation: And we are not to be punished."

ayahs.textUthmani: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهْلَكْنَـٰهُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهْلَكْنَـٰهُمْ‌ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٲلِكَ لَأَيَةً‌ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ ١٣٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَكَذَّبُوۡهُ فَاَهۡلَـكۡنٰهُمۡ​ؕ اِنَّ فِىۡ ذٰلِكَ لَاَيَةً​ ؕ وَ مَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And they denied him, so We destroyed them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Fakaththaboohu fa-ahlaknaahum; inna fee thaalika la-aayah; Wa-maa kaana aksaruhum mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ ١٤٠
ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ ١٤١
ayahs.translation: Thamūd denied the messengers

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ صَـٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ صَـٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ ١٤٢
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ اَخُوۡهُمۡ صٰلِحٌ اَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: When their brother Ṣāliḥ said to them, "Will you not fear Allāh?
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qaala lahum akhoohum Saalihun alaa tattaqoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ ١٤٣
ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ ١٤٤
ayahs.translation: So fear Allāh and obey me.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَسْــَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ‌ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ١٤٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَاۤ اَسۡــَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ اَجۡرٍ​ۚ اِنۡ اَجۡرِىَ اِلَّا عَلٰى رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maaa as'alukum 'alaihi min ajrin in ajriya illaa 'alaa Rabbil 'aalameen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَتُتْرَكُونَ فِى مَا هَـٰهُنَآ ءَامِنِينَ ١٤٦
ayahs.translation: Will you be left in what is here, secure [from death],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ ١٤٧
ayahs.translation: Within gardens and springs

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَزُرُوعٍ وَنَخْلٍ طَلْعُهَا هَضِيمٌ ١٤٨
ayahs.translation: And fields of crops and palm trees with softened fruit?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا فَـٰرِهِينَ ١٤٩
ayahs.translation: And you carve out of the mountains, homes, with skill.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ ١٥٠
ayahs.translation: So fear Allāh and obey me.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا تُطِيعُوٓاْ أَمْرَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ ١٥١
ayahs.translation: And do not obey the order of the transgressors,

ayahs.textUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلَّذِينَ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ ١٥٢
ayahs.textIndopak: الَّذِيۡنَ يُفۡسِدُوۡنَ فِى الۡاَرۡضِ وَ لَا يُصۡلِحُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Who cause corruption in the land and do not amend."
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena yufsidoona fil ardi Wa-laa yuslihoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسَحَّرِينَ ١٥٣
ayahs.translation: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic.

ayahs.textUthmani: مَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا فَأْتِ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا فَأْتِ بِـَٔـايَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ ١٥٤
ayahs.textIndopak: مَاۤ اَنۡتَ اِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثۡلُـنَا ​ ۖۚ فَاۡتِ بِاٰيَةٍ اِنۡ كُنۡتَ مِنَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: You are but a man like ourselves, so bring a sign, if you should be of the truthful."
ayahs.transliteration: Maaa anta illaa basharum mislunaa faati bi-Aayatin in kunta minas saadiqeen

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ هَـٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٌ لَّهَا شِرْبٌ وَلَكُمْ شِرْبُ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ هَـٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٌ لَّهَا شِرْبٌ وَلَكُمْ شِرْبُ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ ١٥٥
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ هٰذِهٖ نَاقَةٌ لَّهَا شِرۡبٌ وَّلَـكُمۡ شِرۡبُ يَوۡمٍ مَّعۡلُوۡمٍ​ۚ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: He said, "This is a she-camel. For her is a [time of] drink, and for you is a [time of] drink, [each] on a known day.
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala haathihee naaqatul lahaa shirbunw walakum shirbu yawmim ma'loom

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٍ فَيَأْخُذَكُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٍ فَيَأْخُذَكُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ ١٥٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَا تَمَسُّوۡهَا بِسُوۡٓءٍ فَيَاۡخُذَكُمۡ عَذَابُ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيۡمٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And do not touch her with harm, lest you be seized by the punishment of a terrible day."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَعَقَرُوهَا فَأَصْبَحُواْ نَـٰدِمِينَ ١٥٧
ayahs.translation: But they hamstrung her and so became regretful.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَخَذَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَخَذَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ‌ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٲلِكَ لَأَيَةً‌ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ ١٥٨
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَخَذَهُمُ الۡعَذَابُ​ؕ اِنَّ فِىۡ ذٰ لِكَ لَاٰيَةً​  ؕ وَمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And the punishment seized them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-akhathahumul 'athaab; inna fee thaalika la-Aayah; Wa-maa kaana aksaruhum mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ ١٥٩
ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ ١٦٠
ayahs.translation: The people of Lot denied the messengers

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ لُوطٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ لُوطٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ ١٦١
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ اَخُوۡهُمۡ لُوۡطٌ اَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: When their brother Lot said to them, "Will you not fear Allāh?
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qaala lahum akhoohum Lootun alaa tattaqoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ ١٦٢
ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ ١٦٣
ayahs.translation: So fear Allāh and obey me.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَسْــَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ‌ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ١٦٤
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَاۤ اَسۡــَٔـلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ اَجۡرٍ​ۚ اِنۡ اَجۡرِىَ اِلَّا عَلٰى رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maaa as'alukum 'alaihi min ajrin in ajriya illaa 'alaa Rabbil 'aalameen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَتَأْتُونَ ٱلذُّكْرَانَ مِنَ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ١٦٥
ayahs.translation: Do you approach males among the worlds

ayahs.textUthmani: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمْ رَبُّكُم مِّنْ أَزْوَٰجِكُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ عَادُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمْ رَبُّكُم مِّنْ أَزْوَٲجِكُم‌ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ عَادُونَ ١٦٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَ تَذَرُوۡنَ مَا خَلَقَ لَـكُمۡ رَبُّكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَزۡوَاجِكُمۡ​ؕ بَلۡ اَنۡـتُمۡ قَوۡمٌ عٰدُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And leave what your Lord has created for you as mates? But you are a people transgressing."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-tatharoona maa khalaqa lakum Rabbukum min azwaajikum; bal antum qawmun 'aadoon

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰلُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْرَجِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰلُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْرَجِينَ ١٦٧
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالُوۡا لَٮِٕنۡ لَّمۡ تَنۡتَهِ يٰلُوۡطُ لَـتَكُوۡنَنَّ مِنَ الۡمُخۡرَجِيۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: They said, "If you do not desist, O Lot, you will surely be of those evicted."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo la'il lam tantahi yaa-Lootu latakoonanna minal mukhrajeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ إِنِّى لِعَمَلِكُم مِّنَ ٱلْقَالِينَ ١٦٨
ayahs.translation: He said, "Indeed, I am, toward your deed, of those who detest [it].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: رَبِّ نَجِّنِى وَأَهْلِى مِمَّا يَعْمَلُونَ ١٦٩
ayahs.translation: My Lord, save me and my family from [the consequence of] what they do."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَ ١٧٠
ayahs.translation: So We saved him and his family, all,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا عَجُوزًا فِى ٱلْغَـٰبِرِينَ ١٧١
ayahs.translation: Except an old woman among those who remained behind.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ دَمَّرْنَا ٱلْأَخَرِينَ ١٧٢
ayahs.translation: Then We destroyed the others.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا ۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا‌ۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ ١٧٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ مَّطَرًا​ۚ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ الۡمُنۡذَرِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned.

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ فِى ذَٲلِكَ لَأَيَةً‌ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ ١٧٤
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ فِىۡ ذٰ لِكَ لَاَيَةً​  ؕ وَمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thaalika la-Aayah; Wa-maa kaana aksaruhum mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ ١٧٥
ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَّبَ أَصْحَـٰبُ لْــَٔيْكَةِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ ١٧٦
ayahs.translation: The companions of the thicket [i.e., the people of Madyan] denied the messengers

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ شُعَيْبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ شُعَيْبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ ١٧٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ شُعَيۡبٌ اَلَا تَتَّقُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: When Shuʿayb said to them, "Will you not fear Allāh?
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qaala lahum Shu'aybun alaa tattaqoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ ١٧٨
ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ ١٧٩
ayahs.translation: So fear Allāh and obey me.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَسْــَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ‌ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ١٨٠
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَاۤ اَسۡـَٔـــلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ اَجۡرٍ​ۚ اِنۡ اَجۡرِىَ اِلَّا عَلٰى رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِيۡنَ ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maaa as'alukum 'alaihi min ajrin in ajriya illaa 'alaa Rabbil 'aalameen

ayahs.textUthmani: ۞ أَوْفُوا۟ ٱلْكَيْلَ وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْسِرِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ۞ أَوْفُواْ ٱلْكَيْلَ وَلَا تَكُونُواْ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْسِرِينَ ١٨١
ayahs.textIndopak: اَوۡفُوا الۡـكَيۡلَ وَلَا تَكُوۡنُوۡا مِنَ الۡمُخۡسِرِيۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Give full measure and do not be of those who cause loss.
ayahs.transliteration: Awful kaila Wa-laa takoonoo minal mukhsireen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَزِنُواْ بِٱلْقِسْطَاسِ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمِ ١٨٢
ayahs.translation: And weigh with an even [i.e., honest] balance.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا۟ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشْيَآءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا تَبْخَسُواْ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشْيَآءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْاْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ ١٨٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَا تَبۡخَسُوا النَّاسَ اَشۡيَآءَهُمۡ وَلَا تَعۡثَوۡا فِى الۡاَرۡضِ مُفۡسِدِيۡنَ​ۚ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And do not deprive people of their due and do not commit abuse on earth, spreading corruption.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laa tabkhasun naasa ashyaaa-'ahum Wa-laa ta'saw fil ardi mufsideen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ وَٱلْجِبِلَّةَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ١٨٤
ayahs.translation: And fear He who created you and the former creation."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسَحَّرِينَ ١٨٥
ayahs.translation: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْكَـٰذِبِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْكَـٰذِبِينَ ١٨٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَاۤ اَنۡتَ اِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثۡلُـنَا وَ اِنۡ نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ الۡكٰذِبِيۡنَ​ۚ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: You are but a man like ourselves, and indeed, we think you are among the liars.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maaa anta illaa basharum mislunaa Wa-in nazunnuka laminal kaathibeen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ ١٨٧
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسَفًا مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ اِنۡ كُنۡتَ مِنَ الصّٰدِقِيۡنَؕ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: So cause to fall upon us fragments of the sky, if you should be of the truthful."
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-asqit 'alainaa kisafam minas samaaa'i in kunta minas saadiqeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ رَبِّىٓ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ ١٨٨
ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord is most knowing of what you do."

ayahs.textUthmani: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِ‌ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ ١٨٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَكَذَّبُوۡهُ فَاَخَذَهُمۡ عَذَابُ يَوۡمِ الظُّلَّةِ​ؕ اِنَّهٗ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيۡمٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And they denied him, so the punishment of the day of the black cloud seized them. Indeed, it was the punishment of a terrible day.
ayahs.transliteration: Fakaththaboohu fa-akhathahum 'athaabu Yawmiz zullah; innahoo kaana 'athaaba Yawmin 'Azeem

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ فِى ذَٲلِكَ لَأَيَةً‌ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ ١٩٠
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ فِىۡ ذٰ لِكَ لَاَيَةً ​ ؕ وَمَا كَانَ اَكۡثَرُهُمۡ مُّؤۡمِنِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thaalika la-Aayah; Wa-maa kaana aksaruhum mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ ١٩١
ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَنزِيلُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ١٩٢
ayahs.translation: And indeed, it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is the revelation of the Lord of the worlds.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: نَزَلَ بِهِ ٱلرُّوحُ ٱلْأَمِينُ ١٩٣
ayahs.translation: The Trustworthy Spirit [i.e., Gabriel] has brought it down

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَلَىٰ قَلْبِكَ لِتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنذِرِينَ ١٩٤
ayahs.translation: Upon your heart, [O Muḥammad] - that you may be of the warners -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بِلِسَانٍ عَرَبِىٍّ مُّبِينٍ ١٩٥
ayahs.translation: In a clear Arabic language.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَفِى زُبُرِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ١٩٦
ayahs.translation: And indeed, it is [mentioned] in the scriptures of former peoples.

ayahs.textUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُمْ ءَايَةً أَن يَعْلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَـٰٓؤُا۟ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَوَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُمْ ءَايَةً أَن يَعْلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَـٰٓؤُاْ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٲٓءِيلَ ١٩٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اَوَلَمۡ يَكُنۡ لَّهُمۡ اٰيَةً اَنۡ يَّعۡلَمَهٗ عُلَمٰٓؤُا بَنِىۡۤ اِسۡرَآءِيۡلَؕ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And has it not been a sign to them that it is recognized by the scholars of the Children of Israel?
ayahs.transliteration: Awalam yakul lahum Aayatan ai ya'lamahoo 'ulamaaa'u Baneee Israaa'eel

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَوْ نَزَّلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ بَعْضِ ٱلْأَعْجَمِينَ ١٩٨
ayahs.translation: And even if We had revealed it to one among the foreigners

ayahs.textUthmani: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيْهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ مُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيْهِم مَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ مُؤْمِنِينَ ١٩٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَقَرَاَهٗ عَلَيۡهِمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا بِهٖ مُؤۡمِنِيۡنَؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And he had recited it to them [perfectly], they would [still] not have been believers in it.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَٲلِكَ سَلَكْنَـٰهُ فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ ٢٠٠
ayahs.translation: Thus have We inserted it [i.e., disbelief] into the hearts of the criminals.

ayahs.textUthmani: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُاْ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ ٢٠١
ayahs.textIndopak: لَا يُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ بِهٖ حَتّٰى يَرَوُا الۡعَذَابَ الۡاَلِيۡمَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: They will not believe in it until they see the painful punishment.
ayahs.transliteration: Laa yu'minoona bihee hattaa yarawul 'athaabal aleem

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَيَأْتِيَهُم بَغْتَةً وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ ٢٠٢

words.translation: And it will come to them

ayahs.translation: And it will come to them suddenly while they perceive [it] not.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَيَقُولُواْ هَلْ نَحْنُ مُنظَرُونَ ٢٠٣
ayahs.translation: And they will say, "May we be reprieved?"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونَ ٢٠٤

words.translation: So is it for Our punishment

ayahs.translation: So for Our punishment are they impatient?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَرَءَيْتَ إِن مَّتَّعْنَـٰهُمْ سِنِينَ ٢٠٥
ayahs.translation: Then have you considered if We gave them enjoyment for years

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ جَآءَهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ ٢٠٦
ayahs.translation: And then there came to them that which they were promised?

ayahs.textUthmani: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يُمَتَّعُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يُمَتَّعُونَ ٢٠٧
ayahs.textIndopak: مَاۤ اَغۡنٰى عَنۡهُمۡ مَّا كَانُوۡا يُمَتَّعُوۡنَؕ‏
ayahs.translation: They would not be availed by the enjoyment with which they were provided.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ ٢٠٨
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَاۤ اَهۡلَكۡنَا مِنۡ قَرۡيَةٍ اِلَّا لَهَا مُنۡذِرُوۡنَ​​​​​ ۛ ​ۖ ‏
ayahs.translation: And We did not destroy any city except that it had warners
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maaa ahlaknaa min qaryatin illaa lahaa munthiroon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ذِكْرَىٰ وَمَا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ ٢٠٩
ayahs.translation: As a reminder; and never have We been unjust.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا تَنَزَّلَتْ بِهِ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينُ ٢١٠
ayahs.translation: And the devils have not brought it [i.e., the revelation] down.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُمْ وَمَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ ٢١١
ayahs.translation: It is not allowable for them, nor would they be able.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّمْعِ لَمَعْزُولُونَ ٢١٢
ayahs.translation: Indeed they, from [its] hearing, are removed.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُعَذَّبِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُعَذَّبِينَ ٢١٣
ayahs.textIndopak: فَلَا تَدۡعُ مَعَ اللّٰهِ اِلٰهًا اٰخَرَ فَتَكُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡمُعَذَّبِيۡنَ​ۚ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: So do not invoke with Allāh another deity and [thus] be among the punished.
ayahs.transliteration: Falaa tad'u ma'al laahi ilaahan aakhara fatakoona minal mu'aththabeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَنذِرْ عَشِيرَتَكَ ٱلْأَقْرَبِينَ ٢١٤
ayahs.translation: And warn, [O Muḥammad], your closest kindred.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٢١٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاخۡفِضۡ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الۡمُؤۡمِنِيۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And lower your wing [i.e., show kindness] to those who follow you of the believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Wakhfid janaahaka limanit taba-'aka minal mu'mineen

ayahs.textUthmani: فَإِنْ عَصَوْكَ فَقُلْ إِنِّى بَرِىٓءٌ مِّمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِنْ عَصَوْكَ فَقُلْ إِنِّى بَرِىٓءٌ مِّمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ ٢١٦
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاِنۡ عَصَوۡكَ فَقُلۡ اِنِّىۡ بَرِىۡٓءٌ مِّمَّا تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And if they disobey you, then say, "Indeed, I am disassociated from what you are doing."
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-in asawka faqul innee bareee'um mimmmaa ta'maloon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٢١٧
ayahs.translation: And rely upon the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلَّذِى يَرَٮٰكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ ٢١٨
ayahs.translation: Who sees you when you arise

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَقَلُّبَكَ فِى ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ ٢١٩
ayahs.translation: And your movement among those who prostrate.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٢٢٠
ayahs.translation: Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing.

ayahs.textUthmani: هَلْ أُنَبِّئُكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَلْ أُنَبِّئُكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينُ ٢٢١
ayahs.textIndopak: هَلۡ اُنَبِّئُكُمۡ عَلٰى مَنۡ تَنَزَّلُ الشَّيٰـطِيۡنُؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَنَزَّلُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ أَفَّاكٍ أَثِيمٍ ٢٢٢
ayahs.translation: They descend upon every sinful liar.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يُلْقُونَ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ كَـٰذِبُونَ ٢٢٣
ayahs.translation: They pass on what is heard, and most of them are liars.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلشُّعَرَآءُ يَتَّبِعُهُمُ ٱلْغَاوُۥنَ ٢٢٤
ayahs.translation: And the poets - [only] the deviators follow them;

ayahs.textUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّهُمْ فِى كُلِّ وَادٍ يَهِيمُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّهُمْ فِى كُلِّ وَادٍ يَهِيمُونَ ٢٢٥
ayahs.textIndopak: اَلَمۡ تَرَ اَنَّهُمۡ فِىۡ كُلِّ وَادٍ يَّهِيۡمُوۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Do you not see that in every valley they roam
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara annahum fee kulli waadiny yaheemoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَنَّهُمْ يَقُولُونَ مَا لَا يَفْعَلُونَ ٢٢٦
ayahs.translation: And that they say what they do not do? -

ayahs.textUthmani: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَذَكَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرًا وَٱنتَصَرُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا۟ ۗ وَسَيَعْلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ أَىَّ مُنقَلَبٍ يَنقَلِبُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَذَكَرُواْ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرًا وَٱنتَصَرُواْ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُواْ‌ۗ وَسَيَعْلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓاْ أَىَّ مُنقَلَبٍ يَنقَلِبُونَ ٢٢٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اِلَّا الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡا وَعَمِلُوا الصّٰلِحٰتِ وَذَكَرُوا اللّٰهَ كَثِيۡرًا وَّانْتَصَرُوۡا مِنۡۢ بَعۡدِ مَا ظُلِمُوۡا​ ؕ وَسَيَـعۡلَمُ الَّذِيۡنَ ظَلَمُوۡۤا اَىَّ مُنۡقَلَبٍ يَّـنۡقَلِبُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Except those [poets] who believe and do righteous deeds and remember Allāh often and defend [the Muslims] after they were wronged. And those who have wronged are going to know to what [kind of] return they will be returned.
ayahs.transliteration: Illal latheena aamanoo Wa-'amilus saalihaati Wa-thakarul laaha kaseeranw wantasaroo min ba'di maa zulimoo; Wa-saya'lamul latheena zalamooo aiya munqalabiny yanqaliboon
